description: A Great League team built around the post-Community Day Thievul lead (with new move Icy Wind replacing Play Rough), Forretress in the middle, and Tinkaton in the back. Thievul is played as the lead to play out the lead matchup, with an ABC-style line so the Thievul + Tinkaton core stays intact.
performanceNotes: Forretress covers flying-type threats and helps against 90-head/steel matchups (Rock Tomb coverage)
Backline (Forretress + Tinkaton) covers Thievul's fairy and fighting weaknesses
Icy Wind gives Thievul a guaranteed defense/attack debuff, making it artificially bulky and winning lead matchups vs Cloud, Cresselia, Diggersby, Jumpluff, Stunfisk

sources.author: JonkusPKMN
sources.videoTitle: The next CDAY make THIEVUL a META BREAKER for the Great League!
